title: Add tests for AdvanceBuildCheckpoint, BlockPlacedEvent, BlockPlaceSkippedEvent, _placeBlockContexts
description:
Sprint44Tests.cs class doc comment promises tests for these checkpoint-related components, but the test methods don't exist. Need to add:
- AdvanceBuildCheckpoint: happy path, missing context, duplicate event
- BlockPlacedEvent handler: normal placement advances checkpoint
- BlockPlaceSkippedEvent handler: checkpoint NOT advanced, correlation completed
- _placeBlockContexts: entry creation, cleanup on goal completion/cancel/timeout

These are the remaining ~50% of TSK-0081 that was documented but not implemented.

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body: Audit verification (2026-06-23): This task overlaps with the Sprint44Tests which already cover AdvanceBuildCheckpoint, BlockPlacedEvent, and BlockPlaceSkippedEvent. The audit confirms more tests would be valuable, especially for: (1) the BlockPlaceSkipped → no checkpoint advance path, (2) duplicate BlockPlacedEvent, (3) missing _placeBlockContexts entry.
